series_metadata.series_description: Documents relating to monitoring of alternative delivery systems. May include quality assurance reports, claims history reports, financial reports, historical data, capitation reports, reviews.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years in office, 5 years in Record Center, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 2 years in office, 5 years in Record Center, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
